topic: A chef preparing Hand-Pulled Lanzhou Ramen (Lamian).

parsed_generation.script:
Scene 1 — Opening (0-2s): side view of chef at wooden prep counter; hands begin kneading dough; flour dust in air.
Scene 2 — Lamian stretch (2-5s): macro close-up on hands as dough elongates into long strands; subtle focus pull along twisting noodles.
Scene 3 — Finish (5-8s): steam rises from a pot; chef lifts glossy lamian into a bowl; final tight shot of the finished noodles.
parsed_generation.narration: Hand-pulled lamian requires precise gluten development and control. The pull showcases texture, tension, and discipline. This sequence highlights the craft behind smooth, silk-like noodles.
